backstory.original: Vin Ursa is one of the deadliest bounty hunters in Wildspace. Raised by autognome thieves and trained by a former Xaryxian assassin, Vin has all the skills she needs to get the job done. To keep those skills honed, she spends much of her off time in the Arena of Blood. If there's one thing you should hope for in Wildspace, it's to avoid ending up on the wrong side of her L.A.S.E.R. sight. She's built her renown fighting some of the most terrifying creatures this side of the Abyss and has a long list of Favored Foes to show for it.
backstory.display: 文·乌尔萨是蛮荒太空最致命的赏金猎人之一。她被机器侏儒小偷抚养成人并接受了萨雷西斯刺客的训练，拥有完成任务所需的一切技能。为了不让自己的技能变生疏，她把自己大量休息时间都花在了血之竞技场。如果说在蛮荒太空有什么可以抓住的救命稻草，那就是不要让她的激光枪的枪口对着你。与深渊这边一些最可怕的生物战斗令她名声大噪，而且长长的偏好对手名单能够证明这一点。

description.original: Vin Ursa uses her Light Accelerating Spectral Energy Relay to attack a random enemy.
description.display: 文·乌尔萨使用她的光加速光谱能量中继器攻击一个随机敌人。

description.original: Vin Ursa blasts an enemy and has a chance to make that enemy a favored foe.
description.display: 文·乌尔萨轰击一名敌人，且有几率将该敌人变成她的偏好对手。

longDescription.original: Vin Ursa blasts an enemy. She has a +20% chance to score a critical hit and the enemy becomes a favored foe if she crits.
longDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨轰击一名敌人。她有 20% 几率造成暴击，并在暴击后将敌人变成她的偏好对手。

description.original: Vin Ursa picks a random monster type as her favored foe. She can add additional favored foe types by using her ultimate ability.
description.display: 文·乌尔萨随机挑选一种怪物类型作为她的偏好对手。她可以使用其杀招技能增加其他偏好对手类型。

description.original: Vin Ursa increases the effect of her buffs whenever Bounty Contracts are used with her in the formation.
description.display: 当文·乌尔萨在阵型中使用奖金契约时，她会提高自身增益的效果。

description.desc: $source can be used in any Light of Xaryxis campaign adventure or variant, even if she would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
$source将可用于任何萨雷西斯之光战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
$source increases the damage of all Champions in the front two columns by $(amount)%.
$source使前两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa focuses her efforts on the front-most columns of the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨将她的精力投入到阵型的前几列。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of all Champions in the rear two columns by $(amount)%.
$source使后两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa focuses her efforts on the rear-most columns of the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨将她的精力投入到阵型的后几列。

description.pre: $source picks a random monster type from a monster in the current adventure as her Favored Foe. Her Favored Foes drop $(amount___3)% extra gold and all Champions deal $(amount___2)% damage to them.
$source在当前冒险中随机挑选一种怪物类型，作为她的偏好对手。她的偏好对手会额外掉落 $(amount___3)% 金币，而且所有勇士对其造成 $(amount___2)% 伤害。

tipText.original: Vin Ursa picks a random monster type as her favored foe. She can add additional Favored Foe types by using her ultimate ability.
tipText.display: 文·乌尔萨随机挑选一种怪物类型作为她的偏好对手。她可以使用其杀招技能增加其他偏好对手类型。

description.desc: $source increases the effect of your Deck specialization by $(amount)% for each Favored Foe she has, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack multiplier.
对于她拥有的每个偏好对手，$source会使甲板专精的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式叠加。增益作用于叠加前的数值。

Whenever you use a Bounty Contract with $source in the formation, Vin Ursa increases the effect of your Deck specialization by $(not_buffed amount)% until the end of the current adventure, stacking multiplicatively. Caps at 100 stacks.
当你对阵型中的$source使用奖金契约时，文·乌尔萨会使卡牌组专精的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，直到当前冒险结束为止，以乘算方式叠加。最多叠加 100 次。

tipText.original: Vin Ursa increases the effect of her buffs whenever Bounty Contracts are used with her in the formation.
tipText.display: 当文·乌尔萨在阵型中使用奖金契约时，她会提高自身增益的效果。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Evil Champions by $(amount)%.
$source使邪恶阵营勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa likes to hang with a rather sadistic crowd.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨喜欢和有施虐倾向的朋友鬼混。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions by $(amount)%.
$source使中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa likes to hang with Champions who like to keep their options open.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨喜欢和思想开放的勇士待在一起。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Good Champions by $(amount)%.
$source使善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa reluctantly hangs out with Champions that have a moral code.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨不喜欢和坚持道德准则的勇士一起玩。

description.original: Most of the time this would cost you, but I'll save these autognomes for free.
description.display: 通常来说这种事要价很高，不过我会免费去救那些机器侏儒。

description.original: I'm in charge because I have the cool coat.
description.display: 我管事是因为我的外套很帅。

description.original: I bring my own stein to taverns -- why pay for a new one every time?
description.display: 我去酒馆都带自己的啤酒杯--何必每次都买新的？

description.original: I don't need luck! ...No wait, I totally do -- give me more luck.
description.display: 我不需要幸运！不等等，我还挺需要的--再多给我些幸运。

description.original: I don't really make a plan, I just kinda go in and hope for the best and things work out.
description.display: 我不怎么制定计划，我就直接动手，希望一切顺利。

description.original: I've been in a LOT of fights. Want to see my completed bounty list?
description.display: 我打过很多很多的架。想看看我已经完成的赏金名单吗？

description.original: Oh, another giff! I love fighting giff -- they're always tough!
description.display: 哦，又是个吉夫人！我就喜欢跟吉夫人打，他们都很强悍！

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: This reminds me of my last fight with a construct...
description.display: 这让我想起上次跟一个构装生物的战斗了......

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Once you've fought one mind flayer, the rest are easy.
description.display: 你跟夺心魔战斗过一次之后，接下来就简单了。

effects.description: Increases the extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: You'll learn when to strike. And more importantly, when not to.
description.display: 你会学会什么时候该出手的。还有更重要的是，什么时候不该出手。

description.original: It's over -- don't try it.
description.display: 结束了，别挣扎了。

description.original: Anyone else want to negotiate?
description.display: 还有谁想谈判的？

description.original: We can do this one of two ways...
description.display: 现在有两种方式可以选......

description.original: And sometimes business is personal.
description.display: 有时候，生意就是私人恩怨。

description.original: Did anyone see where the spelljammer went?
description.display: 有人看到魔法船去哪儿了吗？

description.original: I'm a simple plasmoid making my way through wildspace.
description.display: 我只是一个在狂野太空中闯荡的普通等离子粒团。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Vin Ursa is one of the deadliest bounty hunters in Wildspace. Raised by autognome thieves and trained by a former Xaryxian assassin, Vin has all the skills she needs to get the job done. To keep those skills honed, she spends much of her off time in the Arena of Blood. If there's one thing you should hope for in Wildspace, it's to avoid ending up on the wrong side of her L.A.S.E.R. sight. She's built her renown fighting some of the most terrifying creatures this side of the Abyss and has a long list of Favored Foes to show for it.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Vin Ursa is a support and gold find Champion who builds up a ledger of Favored Foes as you progress through each adventure.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 文·乌尔萨是蛮荒太空最致命的赏金猎人之一。她被机器侏儒小偷抚养成人并接受了萨雷西斯刺客的训练，拥有完成任务所需的一切技能。为了不让自己的技能变生疏，她把自己大量休息时间都花在了血之竞技场。如果说在蛮荒太空有什么可以抓住的救命稻草，那就是不要让她的激光枪的枪口对着你。与深渊这边一些最可怕的生物战斗令她名声大噪，而且长长的偏好对手名单能够证明这一点。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 文·乌尔萨是一位支援和金币寻获型勇士。随着你的冒险推进，她的偏好对手也会越来越多。
